creator: jmg@hydrogen.nike.efn.org
text:
I believe mab@sjca.edu scribbled this message on Mar 8:
> 
> >Synopsis:       wide-dhcp client doesn't work because of byte-ordering problems
> >Environment:
> wide-dhcp 1.3beta port from ports-current, and ISC DHCPd 5.14beta (i
> think...) 

hmm... this port seems to work for me on -current...  I believe there was a
byte ordering problem in bpf that was fixed...  can you confirm that this
problem exists in 2.2 or -current??  

basicly the ports tree is designed for -current systems...  so their patches
and behavior will reflect that...

if you don't have any problems I'll close the pr...

-- 
John-Mark
